div.p: Privacy information for this public website.
This website provides product information and may collect contact enquiry details submitted voluntarily through the Contact page. It does not collect Gmail message content.

li.a: GST & E-Way Login Tool Privacy Policy
Bank Statement to Tally Privacy Policy

div.p: The website records an approximate daily visitor count in a Google Sheet controlled by Samriddhi Associates. The visitor-count sheet stores the date, aggregate count and last visit time. It does not store visitor names, email addresses, mobile numbers, GSTINs, login credentials, Excel data or IP addresses.

A small local-storage entry remembers the current date so the website normally counts no more than one visit per browser per day. Clearing browser storage, private browsing, another browser or another device may create another count, so the number is an approximate usage count rather than a verified identity count. Google hosting may process standard technical logs for delivery and security.
The hosting provider may process standard technical logs for website delivery and security.

When a visitor submits the website contact form, the website collects the Visitor Name, Mobile, Email and Custom Message entered by the visitor. This information is stored in a Google Sheet controlled by Samriddhi Associates and is used only to respond to the enquiry, provide product support and maintain support records.
Contact form information is not sold or used for unrelated advertising. Visitors should not enter passwords, OTPs, GST credentials or other highly confidential information in the contact form.
Practical software tools for GST professionals, businesses and authorised users.
